title: rubus hirtus var. humilidens
intro: Rubus hirtus var. humilidens, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or wild strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. humilidens include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Rubus hirtus var. humilidens can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
